title: Project Assistant/ Executive
description:
·        Prepare and develop store design document packages for new or remodelled stores, from conceptual design through to technical drawings, using AutoCAD.

·        Issue CAD-based vendor packages to brand partners, ensuring accuracy, alignment with Shilla standards, and feasibility for site execution.

·        Conduct feasibility studies based on site conditions and coordinate project design in compliance with Shilla Duty Free guidelines, Changi Airport Group (CAG) regulations, and brand requirements.

·        Collaborate with stakeholders to define the project scope, including compliance with tenancy codes, merchandise layout needs, operational considerations, and IT infrastructure.

·        Maintain ongoing communication with internal teams (e.g. Merchandising, Ops, IT) and external partners regarding field changes and site updates.

·        Provide counter design guidelines and coordinate with vendors/business partners to support the design, fabrication, and build of retail counters/stores.

·        Coordinate with Merchandising to ensure plans and drawings are issued to brands and vendors in line with the construction schedule.

·        Ensure all design documentation complies with Shilla’s internal design standards and external landlord/authority requirements.

·        Assist in obtaining construction permits and CAG approvals to enable timely start of work.

·        Track project progress to ensure timely delivery and adherence to budget.

·        Support flawless store execution by managing and issuing detailed CAD-based installation and design guidelines.

·        Participate in smaller vendor/brand discussions and support execution as delegated by the Senior Project Manager.

·        Perform other related or ad hoc duties as assigned.


REQUIREMENTS

·        Diploma or Degree in Architecture, Interior Design, or a related discipline.

·        Minimum 2 years of relevant experience in store planning, project coordination, or interior construction, preferably in retail.

·        Proficient in AutoCAD with the ability to prepare technical drawings, space plans, and issue complete vendor packages.

·        Strong communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to collaborate with internal teams and external stakeholders.

postedCompany.description:
Shilla Duty Free, an affiliate of Samsung Group is a leading global travel retailer offering quality merchandise from over 600 world-famous brands in fashion, jewelry, cosmetics, perfumes and watches etc.


The Shilla Duty Free is the largest cosmetics & perfumes duty free retailer in Incheon International Airport, and the company strives to expand the global business to serve customers in Asia.

 

The Shilla Duty Free is the top beauty destination at Changi Airport with 23 Cosmetics and Perfumes stores across the four terminals including Shilla Beauty Loft, the world’s first duty free beauty services loft. The Shilla Duty Free also operates two watch boutiques, Maison de Chronus as well as Victoria’s Secret stores at Terminal 2 and Terminal 3.

 

We are rapidly expanding our presence in travel retail!
postedCompany.name: SHILLA TRAVEL RETAIL PTE. LTD.
